title: gymnanthemum coloratum
intro: Gymnanthemum coloratum, also known as the purple top, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Gymnanthemum coloratum is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
